reviews.review_title: Way to expensive for what you get
reviews.review_description:
$10/week per user is crazy for a team of 30. $300 a week is insane.

Immersed is $5/month 
Horizon Workrooms is free

no access to my physical computer, cant remote in or even collab with others on live gsuite or O365 documents.
Hard to enter
I was Stock in the main Menu office itnot a good game 1 star

Firstly, I am certain that this software is excellent compared to others. However, I find the pricing to be extremely vague and unreasonably high. As my trial period was about to end, I received an email stating that I would need to pay €218.75 per month going forward.

I don't understand why it is €218.75. Before subscribing, I had three options: Free, Pro, and Enterprise. I chose Pro, and your official website clearly states that Pro is €35/user/month (min. 5 users), which seems to mean that I am required to pay for 5 users. However, there are times when I might not need to use it for 5 users or even have fewer than 5 users. Even for 5 users, it should be €175, not €218.75. I don't understand how this €218.75 is calculated. So, if I need 10 users, do I need to pay €350? I am very confused by this pricing, and the information on your pricing is quite vague. Initially, I thought it would be a very affordable price for our small business. In reality, the pricing is excessively high. As a result, I canceled the subscription renewal after the trial period. I hope you can provide a reasonable explanation, and at the very least, your official website should have clear and transparent pricing information to avoid misleading consumers. Thank you.

developer_response.body: Hi Sylar, we've heard your feedback. Our prices have been adjusted to a per-user pricing, without a minimum fee. in a few weeks time, the prices will be consistent across all platforms.

reviews.review_description: no support and haveing issuse with downloding it

developer_response.body: Hi Amal, if you need any help you can reach us on support@meetinvr.com

reviews.review_description:
The whole Featureset and support of the vendor is an amazing experience. From the first start years ago a force roadmap and support. Working with this solution is a benefit from a commercial side and from an innovative side too.
We work with it B2B together with customers. Team www.genoa.at

Okay.  When I first set this up, it was cool and interesting.  Graphics were kinda fun.  It was simple.  That was day one.  I tried to log in in day two.  It kept taking me to the payment screen.  I selected the free trial and was done with it.  Now, over the fourteen day trial period, I was charged the subscription rate.  That’s fine.  If it worked.  Now the darn thing won’t let me log in.  I keep ending up at the payment screen.  This is not an easy app to use after the initial trail.  The support page is next to useless.  Not a fan.  I canceled my subscription.

developer_response.body:
Hi there,

We are sorry to hear that you encountered the issue. We have a temporary problem with subscriptions purchased directly from the Oculus Store which is being fixed in collaboration with Meta. Note that if you sign up via our website https://www.meetinvr.com/, everything works perfectly fine. 

I suggest claiming a refund from the Oculus Store using this link: https://support.oculus.com/articles/orders-and-purchases/returns/index-returns/

If that's not going to work, please do not hesitate to reach out to support@meetinvr.com and we will find a way to compensate for your poor experience. I would love to meet you in VR and do a full demonstration :)

Once again, honest apologies for not being able to activate your account.

reviews.review_description: I like it love it but he controls are very hard to control. I neither can't get the scribels out of the screen (if you know what I mean). No offense but I rate this a 2 star.
Waste of money
Are you telling me my work associates and I can meet up in VR and we don't even have to go to the office!?

An amazing collaboration and communication platform with diverse Virtual Environments. Sometimes it felt better than real  just to be in MeetinVR, so comfortable and frictionless to work and interact with colleagues. I guess its most distinguishing characteristic is the intimacy of physical interactions it provides, which is what makes MeetinVR a real game-changer in corporate communication and collaboration.
Meetings in general is boring and not fun!, but MeetinVR changed that. My favorite meeting platform!

I have been using the platform for quite a while now, alongside other ones, and can safely say that it ranks among my top 3 for collaborative work apps. Many of its features - such as diverse environments, NFT avatar partnership (RPM) and work tools (project board, object shaping, PC integration etc) provides for a very seamless workflow. Also having a desktop client creates an accessible option for those who still do not own a headset. Having said that, surely it has a few wrinkles to iron out, like all the others, but with a dedicated team working behind the scenes, it can only get even better.

A fantastic collaboration tool and platform for working in VR. Excellent support and constant upgrades to enhance features for users. Easy to get to grips with as it’s super intuitive. I highly recommend MeetinVR – an excellent business tool. Don’t take my word for it – trial it out and see for yourself!
This software is excellent! You have a lot of tools that you can use for brainstorming and collaboration. User experience is very good. Every business should at least have a demo!

I have been using this excellent platform with my colleagues and it has been providing brilliant experiences to us such as as below. I really recommend you to try this platform out.
Feel presence - engage with colleagues - working time zones apart - by shaking hands, eye contact, facial expressions, and gestures. Come together digitally as if everyone is in the same space.
Advanced collaboration - walk around rooms and use pens, notes, magic pointers, and whiteboards, present files/videos to colleagues, take pictures. There are numerous tools to advance your collaboration.
Amazing rooms - Idea Space for brainstorming sessions, Auditorium for keynotes, Rooftop for events/parties, Workshop Space for large scale workshops, and so on. Rooms can also be customized!

I have worked with the professional version of MeetinVR for over a year from the Quest 2 headset. MeetinVR is one of the most intuitive and immersive VR collaborations currently available (and I have tried around 10 different platforms). The platform is quick and responsive and it feels very natural to engage with coworkers in the various MeetinVR rooms. If you are doing workshops you will find the whiteboards to be effective and useful as you can build a directory of your favorite templates  that you can then easily "snap" to the whiteboard and work on.

I have used this for many meetings and absolutely love it. It's amazing and have found it very stable, leaving a stronger professional view of our meeting. My feedback from delegates has been consistently very positive.

I have been testing a lot of Virtual Reality platforms for collaboration, and this MeetinVR is one of my best platform that I have been tested. There are a lot of amazing rooms pre-built where we can use. I really recommend you to try this platform out, you'll certainly be a big fun to it !

AgentBryan, Catapult by makeSEA also lets you play prerecorded and streamed video in 2D and 360 surround formats and provides an easy way to publish and update all of your XR content. If you like this app you should install Catapult and check out makeSEA.com.  They offer content management and live collaboration using content you are already creating including 3D models, digital twins, 2D and surround video and more - it's the fastest way to organize and share your content as if you are together with your audience in real-life, and to keep it fresh across most popular VR and AR devices, including but not limited to Oculus.
